name: blok-patlat
description: Blok Patlat - Ücretsiz blok puzzle oyunu (Android APK)

scripts.cap:sync: npm run copy-to-www && npx cap sync
scripts.android:bundle: npm run cap:sync && cd android && gradlew.bat bundleRelease
scripts.android:apk: npm run cap:sync && cd android && gradlew.bat assembleRelease
